title: Audit cost-related beads + add composesWithExistingTypes[] declarations per non-divergence discipline
description:
Per [[cost-model-non-divergence-discipline]] (operator-stated 2026-05-26). Substrate's `inference-account-schemas v0.2.0` has 25+ typed cost primitives the encumbrance + ability-cost cohort MUST compose with — not redefine. Author this session left composition declarations as prose hand-waves ('composes with inference-account-schemas') rather than explicit type-by-type lists. This housekeeping bead enumerates each cost-related bead and adds a structured 'composesWithExistingTypes[]' section to each description.

## Cost-related beads to update (13)

Encumbrance cohort (6):
- author-harness-stamina-profile-typed-shape
- author-session-stamina-ceiling-typed-shape
- author-session-encumbrance-state-typed-shape
- author-encumbrance-pressure-level-ordinality-table
- author-session-encumbrance-lens-app
- wire-substrate-policy-responses-to-encumbrance-levels

Ability cohort (6):
- author-agent-capability-catalog-typed-shape
- author-ability-classification-ordinality-table
- author-ability-fleet-topology-report
- author-vault-app-model-mcp-replacement
- author-ability-acquisition-discharge-events
- investigate-harness-side-ability-jit-loader

Sync-cost audit (1):
- audit-inference-control-sync-cost-pattern

## Type bindings to declare per bead

harness-stamina-profile -> InferenceProvider, InferenceConnection, InferenceRateLimit
session-stamina-ceiling -> InferenceQuota, InferenceRateLimit, InferenceCircuitBreaker, InferenceContextClass
session-encumbrance-state -> InferenceUsageEvent (aggregates streams)
encumbrance-pressure-level-ordinality -> InferenceCircuitBreaker (transitions trigger breaker logic)
session-encumbrance-lens-app -> reads SessionEncumbranceState + InferenceUsageEvent stream
wire-substrate-policy-responses -> InferenceCircuitBreaker policy enforcement
ability-cost-shape (if authored) -> InferenceCostEstimate + InferenceTokenPriceBand + InferenceTokenUse
ability-performance-invoice (if authored) -> EXTENDS InferenceUsageEvent
agent-ability-cost-ledger (if authored) -> kura-timeline of InferenceUsageEvent (aggregates per-agent)
ability-listing-model (if authored) -> InferenceModel + InferenceModelCapabilities + InferenceWorkloadClass

## Output format per bead description

```
## Composes with existing types
- InferenceUsageEvent (inference-account-schemas v0.2.0)
- InferenceCostEstimate (same)
- InferenceTokenPriceBand (same)

## Rationale for any NEW fields
<prose explaining why each new field has no existing equivalent>
```

SPM-dependency declarations also added: the authored schema family must declare a Package.swift dependency on inference-account-schemas v0.2.0 (or whichever cost-primitive family). Compilation enforces.
